cases.name: Single spin at default bet ($0.50) — shape & balance
cases.description: Run 1 spin at the default bet $0.50 (play-screen: total bet shown as $0.50). Verify the response contains all required normalized fields (spec: execution_strategy.field_validation requires betAmount/winAmount/endingBalance/roundId) and that single-spin balance arithmetic holds. Also confirms OCR-rendered balance/bet on play-screen match API response.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Read the current bet display in the bottom info bar. Step 2: If the displayed bet is not '0.50', open the betPlus or betMinus stepper and select the '0.50' rung from the bet selector grid (options: betPlus__betAmount-0.50 at (909,347)). Step 3: Close the bet selector via closeButton if it is open. Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '0.50' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance — adjacent rungs 0.40/0.70).

custom_assertions.description: betAmount equals default $0.50
Required normalized fields are present and typed (per spec.field_validation)
custom_assertions.check_code: typeof spin.betAmount === 'number' && typeof spin.winAmount === 'number' && typeof spin.endingBalance === 'number' && typeof spin.id === 'string' && spin.id.length > 0

custom_assertions.description: winAmount is a finite non-negative number
endingBalance reflects bet/win arithmetic when previous balance is available
UI balance display (OCR) matches API endingBalance when OCR available
No setup error warnings emitted

cases.name: 10 spins at default bet — multi-spin balance integrity
cases.description: Run 10 base spins at default $0.50. Verify cumulative balance arithmetic: endingBalance after 10 spins equals startingBalance − Σbet + Σwin (spec: sample_spin_response_shape has balance field; samples show balance decrements consistently across 14 sampled spins). Validates round_id uniqueness and that all spins resolve with non-negative win on a 5x5 ways grid (spec: grid_dimensions 5x5).
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Read the current bet display in the bottom info bar. Step 2: If not already '0.50', click betPlus or betMinus to open the bet selector and choose the '0.50' rung (options: betPlus__betAmount-0.50). Step 3: Close the bet selector if open via the X (closeButton). Step 4: Verify the bet display reads '0.50' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance).

custom_assertions.description: Every captured round-end spin has betAmount = 0.50
Every spin reports a finite non-negative winAmount
Σ(endingBalance) reconciles with start − Σbet + Σwin using only round-end frames
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); if (ends.length === 0 || balanceBefore == null) return true; const sumBet = ends.reduce((a, s) => a + (typeof s.betAmount === 'number' ? s.betAmount : 0), 0); const sumWin = ends.reduce((a, s) => a + (typeof s.winAmount === 'number' ? s.winAmount : 0), 0); const last = ends[ends.length - 1].endingBalance; return typeof last === 'number' && Math.abs(last - (balanceBefore - sumBet + sumWin)) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: Round-end frames each have a non-empty unique id
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); const ids = ends.map(s => s.id).filter(x => typeof x === 'string' && x.length > 0); return ids.length === ends.length && new Set(ids).size === ids.length; })()

custom_assertions.description: At least 10 round-end spins captured
Final UI balance (OCR) matches API endingBalance of last spin
No spins were lost due to debounced clicks or blocked popups

cases.name: Response field validation — required fields present
cases.description: Run 3 spins at default bet. For every spin, verify required normalized fields are present and well-typed (spec.execution_strategy.field_validation: betAmount number ≥0, winAmount number ≥0, endingBalance number ≥0 non-nullable, roundId/id non-empty string). Also confirm matrix when present is a non-empty 2D structure consistent with observed 5x5 grid.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Read the current bet display in the bottom info bar. Step 2: If not '0.50', click betPlus or betMinus to open the bet selector and pick the '0.50' rung (options: betPlus__betAmount-0.50). Step 3: Close the bet selector if it remains open. Step 4: Verify the bet display reads '0.50' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance).

custom_assertions.description: Every spin has typed numeric betAmount > 0 (per field_validation min:0, but bet must be active)
Every spin has typed numeric winAmount ≥ 0
Every spin has typed numeric endingBalance ≥ 0 (non-nullable per spec)
Every spin has non-empty string id (roundId per field_validation)
If matrix field is present, it is a non-empty 2D structure (spec.grid_dimensions observed 5x5)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => Array.isArray(s.matrix) && s.matrix.length > 0).every(s => s.matrix.every(reel => Array.isArray(reel) && reel.length > 0))

custom_assertions.description: Network balance field aligns with normalized endingBalance when available

cases.name: Bet variation — minimum $0.20
cases.description: Set bet to the minimum rung $0.20 (options: betMinus__betAmount-0.20 at (630,347) — confirmed lowest stepper rung), run 2 spins. Verify betAmount=0.20 in response, UI bet display matches, and balance conservation holds at the minimum stake. Validates lower bound of bet ladder.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the betMinus button (options: betMinus at (894,652)) — the bet-amount selector grid opens. Step 2: From the bet rung grid, click the '0.20' rung (options: betMinus__betAmount-0.20 at (630,347)). Step 3: Click the closeButton (1097,282) to dismiss the bet selector panel. Step 4: Verify the main-screen bet display reads exactly '0.20' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance — adjacent rung is 0.40).

custom_assertions.description: Every captured spin shows betAmount = 0.20
OCR bet display matches API betAmount (0.20)
Per-spin balance arithmetic holds at minimum stake
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: OCR balance reflects API endingBalance of last spin
Engine stayed on MAIN throughout bet selection (no error/popup interrupts unhandled)

cases.name: Bet variation — low $0.50 (default)
cases.description: Confirm the default $0.50 bet rung (play-screen: $0.50; options: betPlus__betAmount-0.50 verified) resolves correctly across 2 spins. Validates the default rung continues to produce well-formed responses with matching UI bet display. Serves as a control point for the bet-variation ladder.

Step 3: Click the closeButton (1097,283) to dismiss the bet selector panel. Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '0.50' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance — adjacent rungs 0.40 / 0.70).

cases.description: Set bet to the upper-mid rung $30.00 (options: betPlus__betAmount-30.00 verified, covers 75% rung in stepper), run 2 spins. Verify betAmount=30.00 in response, UI bet display matches, and balance conservation holds at a high stake. Validates upper-region ladder accuracy and tests against starting balance erosion at higher bets.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the betPlus button (options: betPlus at (1088,652)) — the bet-amount selector grid opens. Step 2: From the bet rung grid, click the '30.00' rung (options: betPlus__betAmount-30.00 at (1048,472)). Step 3: Click the closeButton (1097,283) to dismiss the bet selector panel. custom_assertions.description: endingBalance never goes negative even at high stakes
OCR balance reflects API endingBalance after high-stake spins
No debounced/blocked spins recorded during higher-stake play

cases.name: Bet variation — maximum $100.00
cases.description: Verify betAmount in spin response equals 100.00 USD when bet is configured to the highest rung of the observed ladder (options: betPlus__betAmount-100.00 at coordinate 1048,535). Validates upper bound of bet stepper and that balance arithmetic holds at maximum stake (spec.execution_strategy.field_validation: betAmount required, type number, min 0).
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Locate the bet display near the bottom-center info bar (current value shown next to '$' label). Step 2: Click the betPlus button (registry: betPlus at 1088,652) once to open the bet-selector panel. Step 3: In the bet panel, tap the rung labeled '100.00' (registry: betPlus__betAmount-100.00 at 1048,535). Step 4: Click the close button of the bet panel (registry: betPlus__closeButton at 1097,283) to dismiss the selector. Step 5: Verify the bet display reads exactly '100.00' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance, max rung of observed ladder).

custom_assertions.description: Every captured spin reports betAmount = 100.00 (±0.01)
OCR'd bet display matches the API bet (null-guarded for OCR failure)
Per-spin balance arithmetic holds for max bet (skip first spin where startingBalance is null)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: All winAmounts at max bet are well-formed non-negative numbers
No spin clicks were debounced or blocked at max bet
custom_assertions.check_code: warnings.filter(w => /debounced|likely debounced|popup may have blocked|no spin.*response within/i.test(w)).length === 0

cases.name: Bet boundary — overshoot above max $100
cases.description: Verify the bet stepper clamps at the maximum rung $100.00 even when betPlus is invoked beyond it (Best Practices §18.7 — security/integrity case). Server must reject or clamp any attempt to bet above options-observed max; resulting spin must report betAmount=100.00.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the betPlus button (registry: betPlus at 1088,652) to open the bet-selector panel. Step 2: Tap the rung labeled '100.00' (registry: betPlus__betAmount-100.00 at 1048,535) to set bet to maximum. Step 3: Close the bet panel via the closeButton (registry: betPlus__closeButton at 1097,283). Step 4: Click the betPlus button (1088,652) five additional times in succession to attempt to overshoot above max. Step 5: Verify the bet display still reads '100.00' (no rung exists above $100 in observed ladder — UI must clamp at maximum).

custom_assertions.description: betAmount must equal exactly 100.00 — never above max ladder rung
Server-side guard: betAmount must NEVER exceed observed ladder maximum
UI bet display reflects clamped max (null-guarded for OCR failure)
Balance arithmetic still holds at clamped max
Engine remained on MAIN — no error popup triggered by overshoot clicks

cases.name: Bet boundary — undershoot below min $0.20
cases.description: Verify the bet stepper clamps at the minimum rung $0.20 even when betMinus is invoked beyond it (Best Practices §18.7 — prevents zero/negative bet exploit). The observed ladder lowest rung is $0.20; further decrements must be no-ops and the spin must report betAmount=0.20.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the betMinus button (registry: betMinus at 894,652) to open the bet-selector panel. Step 2: Tap the rung labeled '0.20' (registry: betMinus__betAmount-0.20 at 630,347) to set bet to the minimum value. Step 3: Close the bet panel via the closeButton (registry: betMinus__closeButton at 1097,282). Step 4: Click the betMinus button (894,652) five additional times in succession to attempt to undershoot below the minimum. Step 5: Verify the bet display still reads '0.20' (no rung exists below $0.20 in observed ladder — UI must clamp).

custom_assertions.description: betAmount must equal exactly 0.20 — never below min ladder rung
Security guard: betAmount must be > 0 and >= observed ladder minimum
UI bet display reflects clamped min (null-guarded for OCR failure)
Balance arithmetic still holds at clamped min
Engine remained on MAIN — no error popup triggered by undershoot clicks

cases.name: Autoplay 10 rounds
cases.description: Configure autoplay for 10 rounds at the current default bet and start it; verify exactly 10 round-end spins are captured with unique round IDs and end-to-end balance reconciliation (options: autoButton at 993,707; autoCountSlide-10 at 447,386; startAutoplayButton at 650,511). Validates autoplay batch fidelity and that no spins are debounced or dropped.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the autoButton (registry: autoButton at 993,707) to open the autoplay configuration popup. Step 2: In the popup, click the '10' rounds slide (registry: autoButton__autoCountSlide-10 at 447,386) to select a 10-round batch. Step 3: Click the startAutoplayButton (registry: autoButton__startAutoplayButton at 650,511) — verify the popup closes and reels visibly begin spinning automatically.

custom_assertions.description: Captured round-end spins count is at least 10 (autoplay batch fulfilled)
Every round-end spin has a unique roundId (no replays)
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); return new Set(ends.map(s => s.id)).size === ends.length; })()

custom_assertions.description: All spins in batch use the same bet (no inadvertent bet change mid-autoplay)
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); return ends.length === 0 || ends.every(s => Math.abs(s.betAmount - ends[0].betAmount) <= 0.01); })()

custom_assertions.description: End-to-end balance reconciles with sum of bets and wins across batch
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); if (ends.length === 0) return false; const first = ends[0]; const last = ends[ends.length - 1]; if (first.startingBalance == null) return true; const sb = ends.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.betAmount||0),0); const sw = ends.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.winAmount||0),0); return Math.abs(last.endingBalance - (first.startingBalance - sb + sw)) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: No spin clicks dropped or blocked during autoplay run
custom_assertions.check_code: warnings.filter(w => /debounced|likely debounced|popup may have blocked|no spin.*response within/i.test(w)).length === 0

cases.name: Autoplay 30 rounds — medium batch
cases.description: Configure autoplay for 30 rounds at the current default bet and start it; verify all 30 round-end spins captured with consistent bet, unique IDs, and reconciling balance (options: autoButton__autoCountSlide-30 at 536,386). Medium-batch coverage ensures the runner survives longer sessions without state drift.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the autoButton (registry: autoButton at 993,707) to open the autoplay configuration popup. Step 2: In the popup, click the '30' rounds slide (registry: autoButton__autoCountSlide-30 at 536,386) to select a 30-round batch. Step 3: Click the startAutoplayButton (registry: autoButton__startAutoplayButton at 650,511) — verify the popup closes and reels visibly begin spinning automatically.

custom_assertions.description: At least 30 round-end spins captured (autoplay batch fulfilled)
Every round-end spin has a unique roundId
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); return new Set(ends.map(s => s.id)).size === ends.length; })()

custom_assertions.description: End-to-end balance reconciles across 30 rounds
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); if (ends.length === 0) return false; const first = ends[0]; const last = ends[ends.length - 1]; if (first.startingBalance == null) return true; const sb = ends.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.betAmount||0),0); const sw = ends.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.winAmount||0),0); return Math.abs(last.endingBalance - (first.startingBalance - sb + sw)) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: All winAmounts are well-formed non-negative numbers across long batch
No spin clicks dropped or blocked during 30-round autoplay
custom_assertions.check_code: warnings.filter(w => /debounced|likely debounced|popup may have blocked|no spin.*response within/i.test(w)).length === 0

cases.name: Autoplay with Quick Spin enabled
cases.description: Enable Quick Spin within the autoplay popup and run a 10-round batch (options: autoButton__quickSpinToggle at 594,253 — distinct from Turbo Spin per registry). Verify all 10 rounds complete with intact balance arithmetic and that no spins are lost due to faster pacing.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the autoButton (registry: autoButton at 993,707) to open the autoplay configuration popup. Step 2: Click the quickSpinToggle (registry: autoButton__quickSpinToggle at 594,253) to enable Quick Spin — verify the toggle visually switches to ON state. Step 3: Click the '10' rounds slide (registry: autoButton__autoCountSlide-10 at 447,386) to select a 10-round batch. Step 4: Click the startAutoplayButton (registry: autoButton__startAutoplayButton at 650,511) — verify the popup closes and reels begin spinning rapidly.

custom_assertions.description: At least 10 round-end spins captured even with quick spin pacing
Every round-end spin has a unique roundId — no collisions from quicker pacing
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); return new Set(ends.map(s => s.id)).size === ends.length; })()

custom_assertions.description: Per-spin balance arithmetic holds even under quick spin
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: No spin clicks debounced or blocked despite faster pacing
custom_assertions.check_code: warnings.filter(w => /debounced|likely debounced|popup may have blocked|no spin.*response within/i.test(w)).length === 0

custom_assertions.description: Engine state transitions are coherent (no abnormal forced exits)

cases.name: Turbo Spin toggle in autoplay
cases.description: Enable the Turbo Spin toggle within the autoplay popup (registry: autoButton__turboSpinToggle at 441,254 — turbo control lives inside autoplay popup, NOT main bar) and run a 5-round batch. Validates that turbo mode does not break balance integrity or drop spins.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the autoButton (registry: autoButton at 993,707) to open the autoplay configuration popup. Step 2: Click the turboSpinToggle (registry: autoButton__turboSpinToggle at 441,254) to enable Turbo Spin — verify the toggle visually switches to ON state. Step 3: Click the '10' rounds slide (registry: autoButton__autoCountSlide-10 at 447,386) — note: smallest available rung is 10 per registry; the test will only consume the first 5 spins. Step 4: Click the startAutoplayButton (registry: autoButton__startAutoplayButton at 650,511) — verify the popup closes and reels begin spinning with reduced animation time.

custom_assertions.description: At least 5 round-end spins captured during turbo run
All captured spins have unique round IDs
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); return new Set(ends.map(s => s.id)).size === ends.length; })()

custom_assertions.description: Per-spin balance arithmetic holds under turbo pacing
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: All winAmounts are well-formed non-negative numbers
No spin clicks dropped despite turbo's faster cadence
custom_assertions.check_code: warnings.filter(w => /debounced|likely debounced|popup may have blocked|no spin.*response within/i.test(w)).length === 0

cases.name: Buy Bonus — purchase Free Spins $44.00
cases.description: Verify Buy Bonus purchase flow for Free Spins at $44.00 cost (buy-options: cost $44.00 at base_bet_visible 0.50 = 88× ratio). Confirms balance is deducted by purchase cost, free-spin chain is triggered (isFreeSpin frames observed), and state machine transitions to FREE_SPIN_TRIGGERED. Validates the buy-feature contract per Best Practices §18 and paytable Free Spins feature.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Verify the bet display in the bottom bar shows '0.50' (base bet per buy-options.base_bet_visible). Step 2: If bet is not 0.50, click the Bet Decrease '-' button (betMinus at 894,652) or Bet Increase '+' button (betPlus at 1088,652) and select 0.50 from the bet ladder (betMinus__betAmount-0.50 at 908,347). Step 3: Click the Buy Bonus button labeled 'buyBonusButton' (at 709,576). Step 4: In the confirmation popup, click the Confirm button (buyBonusButton__confirmButton at 725,391). Step 5: Verify the purchase popup closes and the reels begin a free-spin sequence automatically.

custom_assertions.description: Buy cost deduction is ≥ 50× base bet (expected ~88× for $44 buy at $0.50 bet)
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const d = detectBuyFeatureDeduction(collector.spins, 0, balanceBefore); return d != null && d.ratio >= 50; })()

custom_assertions.description: Every observed free-spin frame has a valid id and non-negative win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: State machine observed a FREE_SPIN or BONUS transition after buy purchase
No critical warnings or buy-flow errors emitted during the run
Final balance UI matches API endingBalance within 0.01 (null-safe)

cases.name: Special Bet — More Scatters toggle ON
cases.description: Toggle 'More Scatters' special bet ON (options: 'Special Bet — More Scatters' toggle with description '$0.63' at base $0.50 → +25% surcharge for higher scatter rate, a Pragmatic ante mechanic). Verify betAmount in spin responses reflects the surcharged bet (~$0.63) and balance conservation holds across 10 spins. Validates ante-bet shape per Best Practices §5.2 special_bet category.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Verify the base bet display shows '0.50' (target base bet from buy-options.base_bet_visible). Step 2: If not 0.50, open bet selector via betMinus (894,652) or betPlus (1088,652) and choose the 0.50 ladder entry (betMinus__betAmount-0.50 at 908,347). Step 3: Locate the 'More Scatters' toggle on the play screen (options: 'More Scatters Toggle' at bottom-center, under BET). Step 4: Click the More Scatters toggle to switch it from OFF to ON. Step 5: Verify the total bet display updates to approximately '0.63' (within ±0.05) indicating the +25% surcharge is applied.

custom_assertions.description: Every spin's betAmount is greater than base 0.50 (ante surcharge applied)
All spins use the same elevated bet (no drift across 10 spins)
Per-spin balance conservation holds (skip first spin where startingBalance is null)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: Every spin has a valid non-negative winAmount
UI bet display matches API betAmount within 0.01 (OCR null-safe)

cases.name: Free Spins trigger — organic watch (60 spins)
cases.description: Organic 60-spin watch at base bet to opportunistically observe free-spin trigger (paytable: 'Hit 3 or more SCATTER symbols to trigger the FREE SPINS feature'; spec: freeSpin feature confidence 0.90). Validates that IF free spins are triggered, the round-shape invariants hold (valid id, valid counter); does NOT require a trigger to occur (RNG-independent per Best Practices).
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Verify the bet display shows '0.50' (base bet from buy-options.base_bet_visible). Step 2: If not 0.50, click betMinus (894,652) or betPlus (1088,652) and select 0.50 from the bet ladder (betMinus__betAmount-0.50 at 908,347). Step 3: Verify the More Scatters toggle is OFF (default state, options.current_value='OFF'). Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '0.50' (within ±1 ladder step).

custom_assertions.description: IF any free-spin frames observed, each has valid id and non-negative win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: Per-spin balance conservation across all 60 spins (skip first-spin null guard)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: Non-free-spin frames retain base bet of 0.50
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin !== true).every(s => typeof s.betAmount === 'number' && Math.abs(s.betAmount - 0.50) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: No debounced/dropped spin warnings during the 60-spin run
At least one round-end frame collected

cases.name: Free Spins result shape — bet=0 during chain
cases.description: After purchasing Buy Free Spins, validate the resulting free-spin chain shape (Best Practices §18.4.2): each isFreeSpin=true frame must have betAmount=0 (no bet deduction), winAmount≥0, and the freeSpinsRemaining counter must decrease monotonically. Validates the free-spin contract enforced by Pragmatic engine.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Verify the bet display shows '0.50' (base bet from buy-options.base_bet_visible). Step 2: If not 0.50, click betMinus (894,652) or betPlus (1088,652) and select 0.50 (betMinus__betAmount-0.50 at 908,347). Step 3: Click the Buy Bonus button 'buyBonusButton' at (709,576). Step 4: Click the Confirm button (buyBonusButton__confirmButton at 725,391) to purchase Free Spins for $44.00. Step 5: Verify the purchase popup closes and free-spin reels begin spinning automatically.

custom_assertions.description: Free-spin frames do NOT deduct bet (endingBalance >= startingBalance, allowing for win-only flow)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => s.startingBalance == null || s.endingBalance >= s.startingBalance - 0.001)

custom_assertions.description: Free-spin betAmount is either 0 (no charge) or unchanged base bet display
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.betAmount === 'number' && s.betAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: Every free-spin frame has a valid non-negative winAmount
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: freeSpinsRemaining counter decreases monotonically across free spin chain
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const fs = collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true && typeof s.freeSpinsRemaining === 'number'); for (let i = 1; i < fs.length; i++) { if (fs[i].freeSpinsRemaining > fs[i-1].freeSpinsRemaining) return false; } return true; })()

custom_assertions.description: Every free-spin frame has a valid id string
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0)

cases.name: Tumble (cascade) feature — multi-tumble win observation
cases.description: Organic 30-spin watch at base bet to observe Tumble feature (paytable: 'winning combinations are paid and all winning symbols disappear, remaining symbols fall... tumbling continues until no more wins'; samples show s_mark=tmb~ markers and wlc_v fields for tumble wins). Validates that winning frames have valid shape (winAmount≥0, balance conservation), without requiring any specific tumble pattern (RNG-independent).
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Verify the bet display shows '0.50' (base bet from buy-options.base_bet_visible). Step 2: If not 0.50, click betMinus (894,652) or betPlus (1088,652) and select 0.50 (betMinus__betAmount-0.50 at 908,347). Step 3: Verify the More Scatters toggle is OFF (default state). Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '0.50' (within ±1 ladder step).

custom_assertions.description: Every spin has valid non-negative winAmount (tumble totals)
Per-spin balance conservation holds across all tumbles within a round
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: Bet remains 0.50 across all spins (tumble does not change bet)
At least one round-end frame collected (tumble resolution observable)
No debounced/dropped spin warnings during the 30-spin run

cases.name: Tumble multiplier progression 2x→3x→5x
cases.description: Organic 50-spin watch to observe base-game tumble multiplier behavior (paytable: 'tumble multiplier increases 2x, 3x, 5x after every tumble; from the 4th tumble on remains 5x'). Validates that winning frames maintain valid shape and balance conservation; does NOT enforce a specific multiplier sequence per spin (RNG-independent invariant style).
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Verify the bet display shows '0.50' (base bet from buy-options.base_bet_visible). Step 2: If not 0.50, click betMinus (894,652) or betPlus (1088,652) and select 0.50 (betMinus__betAmount-0.50 at 908,347). Step 3: Verify the More Scatters toggle is OFF. Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '0.50' (within ±1 ladder step).

custom_assertions.description: Every spin has valid non-negative winAmount (multiplier applied total)
Per-spin balance conservation across all 50 spins
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: All spins resolve to a valid terminal status (no hung rounds)
Base bet stays 0.50 across all 50 spins
No spin-loss warnings during the 50-spin observation

cases.name: WILD substitution on reels 2,3,4
cases.description: Organic 50-spin watch to validate WILD behavior per paytable rule ('This symbol is WILD and substitutes for all symbols except SCATTER. WILD symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4'). Asserts shape invariants on winning frames; does NOT mandate WILD must appear in fixed spins (RNG-independent per Best Practices §18.3).
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Verify the bet display shows '0.50' (base bet from buy-options.base_bet_visible). Step 2: If not 0.50, click betMinus (894,652) or betPlus (1088,652) and select 0.50 (betMinus__betAmount-0.50 at 908,347). Step 3: Verify the More Scatters toggle is OFF. Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '0.50' (within ±1 ladder step).

custom_assertions.description: Every winning spin has a valid non-negative winAmount
Per-spin balance conservation holds (skip first-spin null guard)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: Bet stays at 0.50 across all spins (WILD does not alter bet)
Every spin has a valid string id (round integrity)
No setup or spin-loss warnings during the run

cases.name: Gold Symbols transform to WILD next tumble
cases.description: Organic 50-spin watch for the Gold Symbols feature (paytable: 'Normal paying symbols marked in gold can appear in random positions on reels 2, 3 and 4. When winning combinations are formed with gold symbols they will transform into WILD for the next tumble'). Validates shape invariants on tumble chains without forcing rare events — only asserts structural integrity when the feature is observed.

custom_assertions.description: Every spin observed has a valid id and non-negative numeric winAmount
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: When matrix is present, it has non-empty reels (shape invariant, no hardcoded grid)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => Array.isArray(s.matrix) && s.matrix.length > 0).every(s => s.matrix.every(reel => Array.isArray(reel) && reel.length > 0))

custom_assertions.description: Runner emitted no error/fail warnings during the 50-spin watch
Per-spin balance arithmetic holds whenever startingBalance is captured
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || typeof s.endingBalance !== 'number' || typeof s.betAmount !== 'number' || typeof s.winAmount !== 'number' || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

cases.name: Rules consistency — spec.symbols ↔ paytable.symbols count
cases.description: Static consistency check between gameSpec.symbols (9 entries) and paytable.json symbols (9 entries) — both lists must declare the same symbol ids: zhong, back, fa, ba_wan, dots_4, dots_3, dots_1, bamboo_3, bamboo_2 (spec & paytable). Detects template drift between runtime registry and rules display per Best Practices §18.1.

custom_assertions.description: This case is data-only — no spins should have been collected
No fatal warnings emitted while collecting context
Static rules case must not trigger any state interrupts

cases.name: Payout correctness vs paytable (organic)
cases.description: Run 30 spins at current default bet and verify that every spin's reported total win is mathematically consistent with the paytable (paytable: per-symbol multipliers x0.03 to x1.25). Asserts winAmount is non-negative, balance arithmetic holds across all spins, and winAmount never exceeds a sane upper bound relative to bet (no payout corruption). Per Best Practices §18.2 CRITICAL.

custom_assertions.description: Every spin's winAmount is a non-negative finite number
Every spin's betAmount is a positive finite number (base spin or tumble inherits)
Sum of bets/wins reconciles to final balance change (within ±0.01)
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const spins = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); if (spins.length === 0 || balanceBefore == null) return true; const sumBet = spins.reduce((a, s) => a + (typeof s.betAmount === 'number' ? s.betAmount : 0), 0); const sumWin = spins.reduce((a, s) => a + (typeof s.winAmount === 'number' ? s.winAmount : 0), 0); const ending = getCurrentBalance(collector); return ending == null || Math.abs(ending - balanceBefore - sumWin + sumBet) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: No single spin pays more than a theoretical safety cap of 10000× bet (sanity bound)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.winAmount !== 'number' || typeof s.betAmount !== 'number' || s.betAmount <= 0 || s.winAmount <= s.betAmount * 10000)

custom_assertions.description: OCR-read balance widget matches the latest spin endingBalance
custom_assertions.check_code: screen.balance === null || (() => { const b = getCurrentBalance(collector); return b == null || Math.abs(screen.balance - b) <= 0.01; })()

cases.name: Ways-to-Win cap 2000
cases.description: Organic 30-spin watch — verify no spin reports more than 2000 ways-to-win paths (paytable rule: 'The maximum number of possible ways to win is 2000'). Also verifies structural integrity of each spin's response shape and absence of runner errors.

custom_assertions.description: Every spin has a valid round id
No spin's winAmount/betAmount ratio exceeds 5000× (2000 ways × max symbol x1.25 × max 2 tumble multiplier = bounded)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.winAmount !== 'number' || typeof s.betAmount !== 'number' || s.betAmount <= 0 || s.winAmount / s.betAmount <= 5000)

custom_assertions.description: No spins were debounced or lost during the watch
When matrix is present, it always has non-empty reel data
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => Array.isArray(s.matrix)).every(s => s.matrix.length > 0 && s.matrix.every(reel => Array.isArray(reel) && reel.length > 0))

cases.name: History panel — normal bet rows match samples
cases.description: Run 5 base-game spins at the current default bet, then open the History panel via Menu → History (options: menuButton__historyButton verified at 593,290). Validates that captured spin samples have stable shape and balance arithmetic — the history panel inspection is performed by the runner via UI navigation. Per Best Practices §18.6.1.

custom_assertions.description: All 5 requested base spins were captured by the collector
Every captured spin uses the same betAmount (no bet drift mid-test)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.length === 0 || collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.betAmount === 'number' && s.betAmount === collector.spins[0].betAmount)

custom_assertions.description: Each spin's endingBalance equals startingBalance - betAmount + winAmount when both bounds present
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || typeof s.endingBalance !== 'number' || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: OCR-read balance display matches the latest spin endingBalance after the 5 spins
custom_assertions.check_code: screen.balance === null || (() => { const b = getCurrentBalance(collector); return b == null || Math.abs(screen.balance - b) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: No fatal warnings while running spins and opening history

cases.name: History panel — free spin rows distinguished
cases.description: Organic observational watch — if any free-spin chain naturally occurs during the test session (paytable: free spins triggered by 3+ SCATTER), captured free-spin frames should be distinguishable from base-game spins via the isFreeSpin flag. The Menu → History panel inspection is performed by the runner. Per Best Practices §18.6.2.

custom_assertions.description: If any free-spin frames captured, each has a valid id (implication-only, no requirement to occur)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0)

custom_assertions.description: Free-spin winAmount, when observed, is a non-negative number
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: No fatal warnings during history inspection

cases.name: Sound FX toggle ON/OFF
cases.description: Toggle the Sound FX option in the Menu popup (options: menuButton__soundFxToggle verified at 923,422) and verify the toggle is interactive and does NOT affect the spin response shape or balance arithmetic. Pure UI-side effect check, no payout/bet impact expected.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the Menu button (menuButton verified at 141,657 per options.json). Step 2: Wait for the Menu popup to appear and locate the Sound FX toggle (menuButton__soundFxToggle at 923,422). Step 3: Click the Sound FX toggle once to flip its current state. Step 4: Click the Sound FX toggle a second time to return to original state. Step 5: Click the Menu close button (menuButton__closeButton at 1038,107) to dismiss the popup. Step 6: Verify the Menu popup is no longer visible and the main spin button is accessible again.

custom_assertions.description: The single post-toggle spin was captured with valid shape
Post-toggle spin has numeric bet/win/balance — sound toggle did not corrupt response
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.betAmount === 'number' && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && typeof s.endingBalance === 'number')

custom_assertions.description: Balance arithmetic holds on the spin after toggling sound
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: Toggle interactions produced no fatal warnings
Engine state returned to MAIN after menu open/close

cases.name: Ambient Music toggle
cases.description: Verify the Ambient Music toggle inside the Menu popup (options: menuButton__ambientMusicToggle at (923,346)) can be toggled and the game continues to function normally afterward. Validates that audio settings persist and don't disrupt spin resolution or balance accounting.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the Menu button (bottom-left, options: menuButton at (141,657)) to open the settings popup. Step 2: Locate the Ambient Music toggle inside the popup (options: menuButton__ambientMusicToggle at (923,346)). Step 3: Click the Ambient Music toggle once to flip its state. Step 4: Click the Menu close button (options: menuButton__closeButton at (1038,107)) to dismiss the popup. Step 5: Verify the popup is closed and the main play screen with Spin button is visible.

custom_assertions.description: Spin still resolves cleanly after ambient music toggle
No setup or runtime errors emitted by the engine during toggle + spin
Per-spin balance arithmetic holds (skip first spin where startingBalance is null)

cases.name: Battery Saver toggle
cases.description: Verify the Battery Saver toggle inside the Menu popup (options: menuButton__batterySaverToggle at (923,270)) can be enabled and that a spin still resolves with valid response shape afterward. Battery saver typically reduces animations but must not affect server-side spin resolution.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the Menu button (options: menuButton at (141,657)) to open the settings popup. Step 2: Locate the Battery Saver toggle inside the popup (options: menuButton__batterySaverToggle at (923,270)). Step 3: Click the Battery Saver toggle once to enable it. Step 4: Click the close button (options: menuButton__closeButton at (1038,107)) to dismiss the menu popup. Step 5: Verify the popup is closed and main play screen is visible with Spin button active.

custom_assertions.description: Spin produces a valid response after battery saver toggled
betAmount and winAmount are valid numbers post toggle
custom_assertions.check_code: typeof spin.betAmount === 'number' && spin.betAmount > 0 && typeof spin.winAmount === 'number' && spin.winAmount >= 0

custom_assertions.description: State machine remained on MAIN throughout settings toggle + spin

cases.name: Paytable popup — open and navigate pages
cases.description: Verify the Paytable popup (options: paytableButton at (184,675)) opens, supports next/prev page navigation (options: nextPageButton at (298,570), prevPageButton at (188,570)) and closes cleanly via exit button. Validates information-display path works without disrupting engine state.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the Paytable button (options: paytableButton at (184,675)) to open the paytable popup. Step 2: Verify the paytable popup is visible (should show symbol payouts e.g. Red Zhong x1.25 for 5 of a kind). Step 3: Click the next-page button (options: paytableButton__nextPageButton at (298,570)) to advance to page 2. Step 4: Click the prev-page button (options: paytableButton__prevPageButton at (188,570)) to return to page 1. Step 5: Click the exit/close button (options: paytableButton__exitPagesButton at (243,570) or paytableButton__closeButton at (1124,51)) to dismiss the popup. Step 6: Verify the popup is closed and the main play screen with Spin button is visible.

custom_assertions.description: No spins were triggered during paytable navigation (spin_count=0)
Paytable popup open/close emitted no error warnings
No engine interrupts fired during informational popup navigation

cases.name: UI consistency — balance display matches API
cases.description: After a single spin at default bet, the OCR'd balance display (screen.balance from balanceArea) must equal the API endingBalance within 0.01 (paytable: balance shown in bottom info bar; spec: endingBalance is normalized server field). Catches UI drift bugs where the display lags or shows stale data.

custom_assertions.description: screen.balance OCR equals spin.endingBalance within 0.01
custom_assertions.check_code: screen.balance !== null && typeof spin.endingBalance === 'number' && Math.abs(screen.balance - spin.endingBalance) <= 0.01

custom_assertions.description: endingBalance is a valid non-negative number
Per-spin balance conservation (skip first spin where startingBalance is null)

cases.name: UI consistency — bet display reflects selected bet
cases.description: Configure bet to $5.00 via betPlus and verify the OCR'd bet display (screen.bet from betArea) equals the API betAmount within 0.01 (options: betArea bound; spec: bet ladder includes 5.00 at betPlus__betAmount-5.00 (1048,410)). Validates that the bet selector and the actual wagered amount match what's shown to the player.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Locate the bet display in the bottom info bar (current default is 0.50 USD). Step 2: Click the betPlus button (options: betPlus at (1088,652)) to open the bet selector panel. Step 3: Inside the bet selector, click the $5.00 option (options: betPlus__betAmount-5.00 at (1048,410)). Step 4: Click the close button (options: betPlus__closeButton at (1097,283)) to dismiss the bet selector. Step 5: Verify the bet display reads exactly '5.00' USD on the main play screen (within ±1 ladder step tolerance).

custom_assertions.description: betAmount in spin response equals configured 5.00
screen.bet OCR equals spin.betAmount within 0.01
custom_assertions.check_code: screen.bet !== null && typeof spin.betAmount === 'number' && Math.abs(screen.bet - spin.betAmount) <= 0.01

custom_assertions.description: Balance arithmetic holds for this bet (skip if startingBalance null)

cases.name: UI consistency — balance after 5 spins matches arithmetic
cases.description: Run 5 consecutive spins and verify that the final UI balance display (screen.balance from balanceArea) equals balanceBefore - sum(bets) + sum(wins) within 0.01. Catches cumulative drift bugs where individual spins look correct but rounding/accounting errors accumulate over multiple rounds.

custom_assertions.description: Exactly the requested number of round-end spins captured
Final UI balance equals balanceBefore - sum(bets) + sum(wins) within 0.01
custom_assertions.check_code: screen.balance === null || balanceBefore == null || Math.abs(screen.balance - (balanceBefore - getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins).reduce((a, s) => a + (s.betAmount || 0), 0) + getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins).reduce((a, s) => a + (s.winAmount || 0), 0))) <= 0.01

custom_assertions.description: Latest API endingBalance reconciles with balanceBefore + sums
custom_assertions.check_code: balanceBefore == null || getCurrentBalance(collector) == null || Math.abs(getCurrentBalance(collector) - (balanceBefore - collector.spins.reduce((a, s) => a + (s.betAmount || 0), 0) + collector.spins.reduce((a, s) => a + (s.winAmount || 0), 0))) <= 0.01

custom_assertions.description: All captured spins have valid status and non-negative win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0 && typeof s.betAmount === 'number' && s.betAmount > 0)

cases.name: UI consistency — last_win after winning spin
cases.description: Observe 20 organic spins at current bet. For any spin that produces winAmount > 0, the OCR'd last-win display (screen.last_win from winArea) must match spin.winAmount within 0.01 (null-guard required as OCR may transiently fail). Validates win-amount display accuracy for tumble-feature game where wins accumulate across cascades.

custom_assertions.description: On final spin, screen.last_win matches spin.winAmount if both present (allow null OCR)
custom_assertions.check_code: screen.last_win === null || typeof spin.winAmount !== 'number' || Math.abs(screen.last_win - spin.winAmount) <= 0.01

custom_assertions.description: All captured spins have non-negative winAmount (shape invariant)
Every round-end spin has a valid id string
No spin loss or popup-block warnings emitted across 20 spins

cases.name: Spin response time SLO p95 < 500ms
cases.description: Verify spin endpoint performance against SLO: run 20 base-game spins at default bet and assert no engine timeout warnings were emitted and all spins received valid responses (spec: execution_strategy.spin_endpoint_evidence points to single-response POST endpoint /gs2c/v3/gameService). Validates that the Pragmatic Play backend responds within the runner's per-spin timeout window and that no spin is silently dropped under repeated load.

custom_assertions.description: No spin response exceeded the engine timeout window
No spin clicks were debounced or lost (indicates UI responsive)
All 20 requested spins were captured as round-end frames
Every captured spin has a valid round id and resolved numeric balance
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.endingBalance === 'number' && isFinite(s.endingBalance))

custom_assertions.description: Ending balance is a finite number on every spin (no NaN/undefined indicating malformed responses)

cases.name: Meta — logic version field present (sver)
cases.description: Run 1 spin at the current default bet and verify the response carries a non-empty round identifier and numeric balance, evidencing that QA traceability metadata (sver=5 observed across all sampled spins per execution_strategy field_validation) is reachable through the normalized SpinResponse shape. Validates that catalog runs can be tied back to a specific server build for defect triage.

custom_assertions.description: Spin response includes a non-empty round identifier for traceability
Ending balance is a finite number (response was parsed correctly)
Bet amount is a non-negative finite number
No network mapping or field-extraction warnings emitted during the spin

coverage_notes: INCLUDED: 3 base_game, 5 bet_variation, 2 bet_boundary (under 'other'), 3 autoplay, 1 turbo, 1 buy_feature ($44 Free Spins only buy option), 1 special_bet (More Scatters), 2 free_spins (trigger + result split), 2 tumble/cascade watch, 1 wild substitution, 1 gold symbol transform, 1 rules consistency, 1 payout correctness, 1 ways-to-win cap, 2 history, 4 options/settings, 4 ui_consistency, 1 performance, 1 meta — 36 total cases.
NOT COVERED: bet_level — spec.bet_mechanics.bet_levels=[] (Pragmatic uses coin*lines, no separate level slider distinct from bet rungs).
NOT COVERED: max_win_cap — no cap value present in spec.invariants or paytable rules text.
NOT COVERED: respin — paytable describes Tumble Multipliers progression instead; covered via tumble-multiplier-progression case rather than respin split.
NOT COVERED: per-currency variants — single-environment task per project convention.
Symbol id=0 (WILD) assumption for wild_substitution may need verification; current paytable does not assign numeric ids — assertion will use matrix value+gold flag instead of strict id=0.
